info.title: Social Media Automation
info.description: Niche-agnostic AI content automation — generate + post videos to IG, FB, YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn.

get.description: Liveness probe. Tests DB connectivity too so Railway / Render get a real signal.

post.description:
Exchange a magic-link JWT (from email) for a long-lived session JWT.

This is how SaaS buyers sign in for the first time after subscribing
on Whop. They click the link in the welcome email which carries them
to /auth/magic on the frontend; the frontend POSTs the token here.

Mode B only — create a new tenant + admin user, issue JWT immediately.

In Mode A this endpoint is disabled by the app router setup.

schema.title: Response Whop Webhook Api Webhooks Whop Post

patch.description: Update daily video generation limits for this tenant.

post.description:
Smoke-test the credentials against the actual provider.

Currently supports `llm` and `image` kinds. Others return a generic OK if the
payload decrypts cleanly (we can't test e.g. social tokens without performing
a real post).

delete.description: Disconnect — deletes the stored OAuth tokens. User can re-connect via OAuth.

post.description: Mark a topic as REJECTED so the worker won't pick it up.
Force a topic into SCORED status with a 10.0 score so it's first in line.

delete.description: Delete a post + its media assets + any schedules. Cascade is configured on the FKs.

get.description: Return the on-disk default template body for `slug` (for the 'reset to default' button).

put.description: Insert or replace a tenant override at this slug.

delete.description: Remove the tenant override — engine falls back to the on-disk default.

post.summary: Run the pipeline end-to-end for a niche + topic, returns the created Post.
Re-run the pipeline for an existing post (uses the same topic/niche).
Post immediately to the named platforms, bypassing the schedule.
Manually trigger a topic source to discover topics now.
post.description:
Synchronous discovery for a single source. Inserts new Topic rows.

Skips topics whose content_hash already exists for this tenant (dedup).

post.summary: Run the full autonomous cycle once now: discover topics → generate videos → schedule.
post.description:
Kick the whole pipeline synchronously for THIS tenant.

Useful for first-time setup and testing instead of waiting for the worker's
timed cycle. Steps:
  1. Run every enabled topic source (discover + score new Topics).
  2. Auto-generate videos from the best unused topics, up to the daily limit.
  3. Auto-schedule each generated post to connected platforms.

post.summary: Manually mark a schedule as DONE (operator override).

get.description: Kick off the Meta OAuth flow.

schema.title: Response Callback Meta Api Oauth Meta Callback Get
Response Callback Youtube Api Oauth Youtube Callback Get

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: Dict of secret fields, e.g. {'api_key': 'sk-...'} for OpenAI. Stored encrypted; never returned.

secret_preview.title: Secret Preview
secret_preview.description: Last 4 chars of api_key prefixed with '...' for visual confirmation

CredentialsUpdate.title: CredentialsUpdate
CredentialsUpdate.description: Rotate the secret payload OR change the label.

NicheUpdate.title: NicheUpdate
NicheUpdate.description: All fields optional — only updates what's provided.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Subset of {instagram, facebook, youtube, tiktok, linkedin}

PromptTemplateUpsert.title: PromptTemplateUpsert
PromptTemplateUpsert.description: Insert or replace a tenant override for the template at `slug`.
